message:
refactor(tests): migrate recorder_storage, tantivy_reindex, snapshot_engine from tokio::test to runtime_compat

Continue the ongoing tokio::test -> runtime_compat migration for three
more modules:

- recorder_storage.rs: convert all async tests to sync with
  run_async_test() helper using CompatRuntime
- tantivy_reindex.rs: same pattern for full_reindex_cold_start,
  resumes_from_checkpoint, empty_log, and all other async tests
- snapshot_engine.rs: convert emit_trigger_sends_to_channel test

Consistent with the migration pattern established in commit 44bd1401.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
